product.name: ArMoto Dura
product.categorySourceGroup: Heavy Warp Knit Fabrics for Shoes and Wind Jackets
descriptions: ArMoto Dura is made of high tenacity polyamide fibers.
For the military shoes industry it is popular fabric to laminate on base and edge of shoes.
100% polyamide 6.6 warp knit fabric for heavy duty and military shoes.
technicalParameters: Fiber | 100% HT Polyamide (PA 6.6) | TS EN ISO 1833
Dimensinal Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | TS EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: For the military shoes industry it is popular fabric to laminate on base and edge of shoes.
100% polyamide 6.6 warp knit fabric for heavy duty and military shoes.
matches.rationale: Product data explicitly and repeatedly states intended use for military shoes, directly matching the military application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Family/subFamily name is 'ArMoto' and family descriptor references motorcycle apparel fabrics, but no explicit statement ties this specific product to motorcycle riding gear rather than shoes.
